hero-about-me: I am a recent Computer Science graduate from the University of Canterbury, with strong programming fundamentals and hands-on experience developed through academic coursework and personal projects.
hero-about-me-second: I am currently building a full-stack web application for a Chinese tutoring business, focusing on creating practical, user-centred solutions. I am eager to begin my career in software development, continue expanding my technical skills, and contribute to building digital products that deliver meaningful value to users and the wider community.
hobbit: In my spare time, I enjoy photography and capturing wonderful moments in life through my lens.
